events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! The legendary Ringo Starr is celebrating his birthday. What's your favourite Fab Four track featuring his distinctive drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: A Kind of Magic
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium anthems to his incredible guitar solos, what's your ultimate Queen track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones era?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever by launching with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star, though? We think not!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in 1994, becoming a cornerstone of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century and counting! Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' dropped back in '94 and still sounds as fresh as ever. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, billed as 'An Aquarian Exposition: 3 Days of Peace & Music', began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for three days of peace and music. What's your favourite iconic Woodstock performance?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977, leaving behind an unparalleled legacy as the 'King of Rock and Roll'.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His music continues to influence generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the world lost a true lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us far too soon. His guitar mastery remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that famous zebra crossing cover, was released in 1969.

angles.name: Crossing into History
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that legendary album cover. Which track from the record is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of rock and roll attitude! Happy birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde. What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe a Party
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track from the iconic Mancunian?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Over five decades since John Lennon released his powerful message of peace, 'Imagine'. Its sentiment still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod in 2001, revolutionising portable music and putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple dropped the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your absolute favourite 007 movie or moment?

events.title: John Lennon turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
